question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to use the Draft with Einstein feature in Sales Cloud to create a personalized introduction email.
After creating a proposed draft email, which predefined adjustment should UC choose to revise the draft with a more casual tone?
options: Make Less Formal
Enhance Friendliness
Optimize for Clarity
explanation: Einstein Trust Layer actúa como intermediario entre el LLM y los datos de Salesforce, asegurando que la información sensible sea enmascarada antes de enviarla al modelo y que las respuestas sean auditadas. Esto garantiza privacidad y cumplimiento normativo sin sacrificar la utilidad de la IA.

question: What should an AI Specialist consider when using related list merge fields in a prompt template associated with an Account object in Prompt Builder?
options: The Activities related list on the Account object Is not supported because it is a polymorphic field.
If person accounts have been enabled, merge fields will not be available for the Account object.
Prompt generation will yield no response when there is no related list associated with an Account in runtime.
explanation: Topics en Agentforce definen áreas de conversación y sus instrucciones, mientras que las Actions son las tareas específicas ejecutables dentro de cada topic. Sin Topics bien definidos, el agente no puede enrutar correctamente las solicitudes del usuario a las acciones adecuadas.

question:
An Al Specialist is tasked with configuring a generative model to create personalized sales emails using customer data stored in Salesforce. The AI Specialist has already fine-tuned a large language model (LLM) on the OpenAI platform. Security and data privacy are critical concerns for the client. 
How should the AI Specialist integrate the custom LLM into Salesforce?
options: Create an application of the custom LLM and embed it in Sales Cloud via iFrame.
Add the fine-tuned LLM in Einstein Studio Model Builder.
Enable model endpoint on OpenAl and make callouts to the model to generate emails.
explanation: Para integrar un LLM personalizado fine-tuneado en OpenAI a Salesforce de forma segura, se debe usar Einstein Studio Model Builder para registrar y gestionar el modelo externo. Hacer callouts directos a OpenAI o incrustar con iFrame no proporciona las garantías de seguridad y control del Einstein Trust Layer.

question:
The sales team at a hotel resort would like to generate a guest summary about the guests' interests and provide recommendations based on their activity preferences captured in each guest profile. They want the summary to be available only on the contact record page. 
Which AI capability should the team use?
options: Einstein Agentforce
Prompt Builder
Model Builder
explanation: Para generar resúmenes de huéspedes basados en sus intereses y reservas históricas, un Sales Email template con grounding en objetos relacionados del CRM es la opción correcta. Las otras alternativas no permiten el nivel de personalización contextual necesario para este caso de uso de hospitalidad.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) has a legacy system that needs to integrate with Salesforce. UC wishes to create a digest of account action plans using the generative API feature. 
Which API service should UC use to meet this requirement?
options: REST API
Metadata API
SOAP API
explanation: Para integrar un sistema legado con Salesforce y generar resúmenes de planes de acción usando la API generativa, se debe usar REST API. Metadata API se usa para configuración de metadatos y SOAP API para integraciones empresariales antiguas, no para funciones de IA generativa.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to include data from the response of external service invocation (REST API callout) into the prompt template. 
How should the AI Specialist meet this requirement?
options: Convert the JSON to an XML merge field.
Use External Service Record merge fields.
Use “Add Prompt Instructions” flow element.
explanation: Para incluir datos de una invocación REST API externa en un prompt template, se debe usar un Flow iniciado por prompt que realice el callout y retorne los datos como input al template. Los merge fields estándar no pueden acceder a servicios externos; solo los flows permiten este tipo de integración dinámica.

question: What is the correct process to leverage Prompt Builder in a Salesforce org?
options: Select the appropriate prompt template type to use, select one of Salesforce's standard prompts, determine the object to associate the prompt, select a record to validate against, and associate the prompt to an action.

Select the appropriate prompt template type to use, develop the prompt within the prompt workspace, select resources to dynamically insert CRM-derived grounding data, pick the model to use, and test and validate the generated responses.
Enable the target object for generative prompting, develop the prompt within the prompt workspace, select records to fine-tune and ground
explanation: El proceso correcto en Prompt Builder incluye: seleccionar el tipo de template, desarrollar el prompt en el workspace, agregar recursos de grounding dinámico con datos CRM, seleccionar el modelo y validar las respuestas generadas. Las otras opciones omiten pasos críticos o incluyen configuraciones incorrectas del proceso.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to assess Salesforce's generative Al features but has concerns over its company data being exposed to third party large language models (LLMs). Specifically, UC wants the following capabilities to be part of Einstein's generative AI service.
- No data is used for LLM training or product improvements by third-party LLMs.
- No data is retained outside of UC's Salesforce org.
- The data sent cannot be accessed by the LLM provider.
Which property of the Einstein Trust Layer should the AI Specialist highlight to UC that addresses these requirements?
options: Prompt Defense
Zero-Data Retention Policy
Data Masking
explanation: Einstein Trust Layer es la capa de seguridad de Salesforce que protege los datos al enmascarar información sensible antes de enviarla al LLM y al auditar todas las interacciones. Esta característica permite a las organizaciones adoptar IA generativa con confianza, cumpliendo con sus políticas de seguridad y privacidad.

question:
An AI Specialist is creating a custom action in Einstein Agentforce or copilot . 
Which option is available for the AI Specialist to choose for the custom Agentforce or copilot  action?
options: Apex trigger
SOQL
Flows
explanation: Al crear una acción personalizada en Agentforce, las opciones disponibles como referencia de acción incluyen flows, Apex y prompt templates. Estas son las tres opciones estándar que el platform soporta para implementar la lógica de las Agent Actions personalizadas.

question:
Universal Containers is planning a marketing email about products that most closely match a customer's expressed interests. 
What should an AI Specialist recommend to generate this email?
options: Standard email marketing template using Apex or flows for matching interest in products
Custom sales email template which is grounded with interest and product information
Standard email draft with Einstein and choose standard email template
explanation: Para marketing emails personalizados basados en productos que coincidan con el historial de un cliente, Einstein Recommendation Builder es la solución adecuada ya que analiza patrones de compra y sugiere productos relevantes. Prompt Builder puede generar el email pero necesita los datos de recomendación como input.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales reps to explore opportunities that are similar to previously won opportunities by entering the utterance, "Show me other opportunities like this one." 
How should UC achieve this in Einstein Agentforce or copilot ?
options: Use the standard Agentforce action.
Create a custom Agentforce action calling a flow.
Create a custom Agentforce action calling an Apex class.
explanation: Find Similar Opportunities en Einstein for Sales permite a los reps explorar oportunidades parecidas a las actuales para identificar patrones de éxito y estrategias de cierre. Esta función analiza características de deals anteriores cerrados para sugerir oportunidades con alta probabilidad de éxito similar.

question:
Universal Containers is using Einstein Agentforce or copilot  for Sales to find similar opportunities to help close deals faster. The team wants to understand the criteria used by the Agentforce or copilot  to match opportunities. 
What is one criteria that Einstein Agentforce or copilot  for Sales uses to match similar opportunities?
options: Matched opportunities are limited to the same account.
Matched opportunities were created in the last 12 months.
Matched opportunities have a status of Closed Won from last 12 months.
explanation: Einstein Agentforce for Sales usa Find Similar Opportunities para encontrar deals con características parecidas, ayudando a los reps a replicar estrategias exitosas. Esta función analiza datos históricos de oportunidades cerradas para identificar patrones y hacer recomendaciones accionables.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to use the related lists from an account in a custom prompt template. 
What should the AI Specialist consider when configuring the prompt template?
options: The text encoding (for example, UTF-8, ASCII) option
The maximum number of related list merge fields
The choice between XML and JSON rendering formats for the list
explanation: Para usar related lists de una cuenta en un prompt template personalizado, el AI Specialist debe seleccionar el objeto Account como base y luego agregar las related lists deseadas como merge fields dentro del workspace. Sin seleccionar la related list correctamente, los datos relacionados no estarán disponibles en el template.

question: Which use case is best supported by Salesforce Einstein Agentforce or copilot 's capabilities?
options: Bring together a conversational interface for interacting with AI for all Salesforce users, such as developers and ecommerce retailers.
Enable Salesforce admin users to create and train custom large language models (LLMs) using CRM data.
Enable data scientists to train predictive AI models with historical CRM data using built-in machine learning capabilities.
explanation: Einstein Agentforce está mejor soportado para casos de uso de asistencia conversacional, automatización de tareas repetitivas y respuestas basadas en Knowledge. No está diseñado para reemplazar lógica de negocios compleja, integraciones en tiempo real de datos externos sin configuración, ni procesos que requieren juicio humano especializado.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to ground a new prompt template with the User related list.
What should the AI Specialist consider?
options: The User related list should have View All access.
The User related list needs to be included on the record page.
The User related list is not supported in prompt templates.
explanation: La related list de Users no está disponible como merge field estándar en los prompt templates de Salesforce. El AI Specialist debe usar un Flow para recuperar los datos del usuario relacionado y pasarlos como input al template para poder incluir esa información en el grounding.

question: Based on the user utterance, “Show me all the customers in New York", which standard Einstein Agentforce or copilot  action will the planner service use?
options: Query Records
Select Records
Fetch Records
explanation: Para la utterance 'Show me all the customers in New York', el planner seleccionará la acción estándar Query Records, que es la diseñada para recuperar listas de registros basadas en criterios de búsqueda. Select Records y Fetch Records no son las acciones estándar del catálogo de Agentforce para este tipo de solicitud.

question:
Universal Containers implements Custom Agentforce or copilot  Actions to enhance its customer service operations. The development team needs to understand the core components of a Custom Agentforce or copilot  Action to ensure proper configuration and functionality.
What should the development team review in the Custom Agentforce or copilot  Action configuration to identify one of the core components of a Custom Agentforce or copilot  Action?
options: Instructions
Output Types
Action Triggers
explanation: Las Custom Actions en Agentforce mejoran el servicio al cliente al extender las capacidades del agente con lógica de negocio personalizada mediante flows, Apex o prompt templates. Las Action Instructions son críticas para que el LLM seleccione la acción correcta según la utterance del usuario.

question:
An AI Specialist at Universal Containers is working on a prompt template to generate personalized emails for product demonstration requests from customers. It is important for the Al-generated email to adhere strictly to the guidelines, using only associated opportunity information, and to encourage the recipient to take the desired action.
How should the AI Specialist include these instructions on a new line in the prompt template?
options: Surround them with triple quotes (""").
Make sure merged fields are defined.
Use curly brackets {} to encapsulate instructions.
explanation: Para generar emails personalizados con datos de múltiples objetos relacionados, un Flex Template es el tipo correcto ya que acepta múltiples inputs de distintos objetos. Los Sales Email templates estándar están limitados a un solo objeto base y no permiten grounding de múltiples fuentes independientes.

question:
Universal Containers is interested in improving the sales operation efficiency by analyzing their data using Al-powered predictions in Einstein Studio. 
Which use case works for this scenario?
options: Predict customer sentiment toward a promotion message.
Predict customer lifetime value of an account.
Predict most popular products from new product catalog.
explanation: Para mejorar la eficiencia de ventas analizando datos de llamadas, Einstein Conversation Insights es la solución correcta ya que extrae automáticamente insights de grabaciones de llamadas. Esta función identifica menciones de competidores, productos y frases clave sin necesidad de revisión manual.

question:
Universal Containers wants to use an external large language model (LLM) in Prompt Builder.
What should an AI Specialist recommend?
options: Use Apex to connect to an external LLM and ground the prompt.
Use BYO-LLM functionality in Einstein Studio,
Use Flow and External Services to bring data from an external LLM.
explanation: Para usar un LLM externo en Prompt Builder, el AI Specialist debe primero registrar el modelo en Model Builder (Einstein Studio) y luego seleccionarlo como el modelo a usar en el template. Sin registrar el modelo externo previamente, no aparecerá disponible en las opciones de Prompt Builder.

question:
The marketing team at Universal Containers is looking for a way to personalize emails based on customer behavior, preferences, and purchase history.
Why should the team use Einstein Agentforce or copilot  as the solution?
options: To generate relevant content when engaging with each customer
To analyze past campaign performance
To send automated emails to all customers
explanation: Para personalizar emails de marketing basados en el historial del cliente con datos del CRM, los Sales Email templates con grounding en campos del objeto de contacto u oportunidad son la solución más directa. Esto permite generar contenido personalizado sin necesidad de exportar datos a herramientas externas.

question:
Universal Containers has an active standard email prompt template that does not fully deliver on the business requirements. 
Which steps should an AI Specialist take to use the content of the standard prompt email template in question and customize it to fully meet the business requirements?
options: Save as New Template and edit as needed.
Clone the existing template and modify as needed.
Save as New Version and edit as needed.
explanation: Para mejorar un template de email estándar que no cumple completamente los requisitos, se debe usar la opción 'Save As' para crear una copia personalizable del template estándar y luego modificar el prompt y los recursos. Editar directamente el template estándar puede sobrescribirse en actualizaciones futuras de Salesforce.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is using Einstein Generative AI to generate an account summary. UC aims to ensure the content is safe and inclusive, utilizing the Einstein Trust Layer's toxicity scoring to assess the content's safety level.
What does a safety category score of 1 indicate in the Einstein Generative Al Toxicity Score?
options: Not safe
Safe
Moderately safe
explanation: Para generar un resumen de cuenta con IA mientras se controla qué datos se incluyen, se deben usar field sets o related lists específicas como recursos de grounding en el prompt template. Esto asegura que el resumen use solo la información relevante y aprobada por la organización.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to use Flow to bring data from unified Data Cloud objects to prompt templates.
Which type of flow should UC use?
options: Data Cloud-triggered flow
Template-triggered prompt flow
Unified-object linking flow
explanation: Para traer datos de objetos unificados de Data Cloud a prompt templates usando Flow, se debe configurar un Flow que consulte los objetos de Data Cloud y pase los datos como inputs al template. Esta integración permite enriquecer el grounding con datos unificados de múltiples fuentes en Data Cloud.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to offer personalized service experiences and reduce agent handling time with Al-generated email responses, grounded in Knowledge base.
Which AI capability should UC use?
options: Einstein Email Replies
Einstein Service Replies for Email
Einstein Generative Service Replies for Email
explanation: Para ofrecer experiencias de servicio personalizadas y reducir el tiempo de manejo de agentes, Einstein Service Replies con grounding en Knowledge es la solución adecuada. Esta función genera respuestas sugeridas basadas en la base de conocimiento, reduciendo el tiempo que los agentes dedican a redactar respuestas.

question: What is the main purpose of Prompt Builder?
options: A tool for developers to use in Visual Studio Code that creates prompts for Apex programming, assisting developers in writing code more efficiently.
A tool that enables companies to create reusable prompts for large language models (LLMs), bringing generative AI responses to their flow of work
A tool within Salesforce offering real-time Al-powered suggestions and guidance to users, Improving productivity and decision-making.
explanation: El propósito principal de Prompt Builder es permitir a los administradores y especialistas de IA crear, gestionar y probar prompt templates que generan contenido con LLMs usando datos del CRM como grounding. Es la herramienta central para estandarizar y reutilizar prompts en toda la organización de Salesforce.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is Implementing Service AI Grounding to enhance its customer service operations. UC wants to ensure that its AI generated responses are grounded in the most relevant data sources. The team needs to configure the system to include all supported objects for grounding.
Which objects should UC select to configure Service AI Grounding?
options: Case, Knowledge, and Case Notes
Case and Knowledge
Case, Case Emails, and Knowledge
explanation: Service AI Grounding conecta las respuestas generadas por IA con los datos de Knowledge y casos de Salesforce, asegurando que las respuestas estén fundamentadas en información real de la organización. Sin esta configuración, el LLM podría generar respuestas no alineadas con las políticas y conocimiento de la empresa.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) has a mature Salesforce org with a lot of data in cases and Knowledge articles. UC is concerned that there are many legacy fields, with data that might not be applicable for Einstein AI to draft accurate email responses.
Which solution should UC use to ensure Einstein AI can draft responses from a defined data source?
options: Service AI Grounding
Work Summaries
Service Replies
explanation: Con una base madura de casos y artículos de Knowledge, Einstein Reply Recommendations o Service Replies son las funciones adecuadas para sugerir respuestas a agentes basándose en interacciones históricas y la base de conocimiento. Esto reduce el tiempo de respuesta y mejora la consistencia del servicio.

question:
Universal Containers plans to implement prompt templates that utilize the standard foundation models.
What should the AI Specialist consider when building prompt templates in Prompt Builder?
options: Include multiple-choice questions within the prompt to test the LLM's understanding of the context.
Ask it to role-play as a character in the prompt template to provide more context to the LLM.
Train LLM with data using different writing styles including word choice, intensifiers, emojis, and punctuation.
explanation: Al implementar prompt templates con modelos fundacionales estándar de Salesforce, se debe considerar que los hiperparámetros predeterminados están optimizados por Salesforce y pueden no ser ajustables directamente. Cualquier personalización de modelo debe hacerse a través de Model Builder para mantener la compatibilidad con el Trust Layer.

question:
An AI Specialist at Universal Containers (UC) is tasked with creating a new custom prompt template to populate a field with generated output. UC enabled the Einstein Trust Layer to ensure AI Audit data is captured and monitored for adoption and possible enhancements.
Which prompt template type should the AI Specialist use and which consideration should they review?
options: Flex, and that Dynamic Fields is enabled
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Fields is enabled
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Forms is enabled
explanation: Para crear un prompt template personalizado que use datos de un objeto específico, el AI Specialist debe seleccionar el objeto correcto como base del template y luego agregar los merge fields y related lists necesarias. La configuración del objeto base determina qué datos están disponibles para grounding.

question:
Universal Containers needs a tool that can analyze voice and video call records to provide insights on competitor mentions, coaching opportunities, and other key information. The goal is to enhance the team's performance by identifying areas for improvement and competitive intelligence.
Which feature provides insights about competitor mentions and coaching opportunities?
options: Call Summaries
Einstein Sales Insights
Call Explorer
explanation: Einstein Conversation Insights es la herramienta diseñada para analizar grabaciones de llamadas de voz y video, extrayendo insights sobre menciones de competidores, productos y tendencias. Esta función proporciona visibilidad automática post-llamada sin necesidad de revisión manual de las grabaciones.

question:
An AI Specialist implements Einstein Sales Emails for a sales team. The team wants to send personalized follow-up emails to leads based on their interactions and data stored in Salesforce. The AI Specialist needs to configure the system to use the most accurate and up-to-date information for email generation.
Which grounding technique should the AI Specialist use?
options: Ground with Apex Merge Fields
Ground with Record Merge Fields
Automatic grounding using Draft with Einstein feature
explanation: Einstein Sales Emails implementado para un equipo de ventas permite enviar emails personalizados y contextualizados a gran escala. Para que los emails se generen correctamente, los usuarios deben tener acceso a los campos del registro del destinatario; de lo contrario, los placeholders no se sustituyen con datos reales.

question: How should an organization use the Einstein Trust layer to audit, track, and view masked data?
options: Utilize the audit trail that captures and stores all LLM submitted prompts in Data Cloud.
In Setup, use Prompt Builder to send a prompt to the LLM requesting for the masked data.
Access the audit trail in Setup and export all user-generated prompts.
explanation: Para auditar, rastrear y ver datos enmascarados en el Einstein Trust Layer, se debe acceder al Einstein Trust Layer Audit Trail en Setup, que registra todas las interacciones con el LLM incluyendo qué datos fueron enmascarados. Esta herramienta proporciona transparencia y cumplimiento normativo en el uso de IA.

question: In Model Playground, which hyperparameters of an existing Salesforce-enabled foundational model can an AI Specialist change?
options: Temperature, Frequency Penalty, Presence Penalty
Temperature, Top-k sampling, Presence Penalty
Temperature, Frequency Penalty, Output Tokens
explanation: En Model Playground, los hiperparámetros que se pueden ajustar de los modelos fundacionales habilitados por Salesforce incluyen temperatura, top-p y max tokens. Estos parámetros controlan la creatividad, diversidad y longitud de las respuestas generadas por el modelo.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is implementing Einstein Generative AI to improve customer insights and interactions. UC needs audit and feedback data to be accessible for reporting purposes.
What is a consideration for this requirement?
options: Storing this data requires Data Cloud to be provisioned.
Storing this data requires a custom object for data to be configured.
Storing this data requires Salesforce big objects.
explanation: Para mejorar los insights de clientes con Einstein Generative AI, se pueden combinar datos del CRM con modelos de lenguaje para generar resúmenes contextuales y recomendaciones personalizadas. El grounding con datos reales del CRM es clave para que los insights sean precisos y relevantes para cada cliente.

question:
Universal Containers has seen a high adoption rate of a new feature that uses generative AI to populate a summary field of a custom object, Competitor Analysis. All sales users have the same profile but one user cannot see the generative AI-enabled field icon next to the summary field.
What is the most likely cause of the issue?
options: The user does not have the Prompt Template User permission set assigned.
The prompt template associated with summary field is not activated for that user.
The user does not have the field Generative AI User permission set assigned.
explanation: Una alta tasa de adopción de una función generativa que popula campos con IA indica que Field Generation prompt templates están siendo usados efectivamente. Para mantener la calidad, es importante monitorear los resultados generados y ajustar las instrucciones del prompt cuando se detecten inconsistencias.

question:
Universal Containers wants to implement a solution in Salesforce with a custom UX that allows users to enter a sales order number. Subsequently, the system will invoke a custom prompt template to create and display a summary of the sales order header and sales order details. 
Which solution should an AI Specialist implement to meet this requirement?
options: Create a screen flow to collect sales order number and invoke the prompt template using the standard "Prompt Template" flow action.
Create a template-triggered prompt flow and invoke the prompt template using the standard “Prompt Template” flow action.
Create an autolaunched flow and invoke the prompt template using the standard “Prompt Template" flow action.
explanation: Para implementar una solución con UX personalizada que permita a los usuarios interactuar con IA generativa en Salesforce, se puede usar Lightning Web Components combinados con Apex que invoque prompt templates a través de la API. Esta arquitectura permite máxima flexibilidad en la experiencia del usuario.

question:
Northern Trail Outfitters (NTO) wants to configure Einstein Trust Layer in its production org but is unable to see the option on the Setup page.
After provisioning Data Cloud, which step must an Al Specialist take to make this option available to NTO?
options: Turn on Einstein Agentforce or copilot .
Turn on Einstein Generative AI.
Turn on Prompt Builder.
explanation: Para configurar Einstein Trust Layer en producción, NTO debe activar el Trust Layer en Setup, configurar las reglas de data masking según sus políticas de privacidad y validar el comportamiento con prompts de prueba. La configuración en sandbox previa es recomendada antes de activar en producción.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is looking to enhance its operational efficiency. UC has recently adopted Salesforce and is considering implementing Einstein Agentforce or copilot  to improve its processes. 
What is a key reason for implementing Einstein Agentforce or copilot ?
options: Allowing AI to perform tasks without user interaction
Streamlining workflows and automating repetitive tasks
explanation: Para mejorar la eficiencia operativa con Agentforce, el AI Specialist debe evaluar qué procesos repetitivos pueden automatizarse mediante Agent Actions y qué datos del CRM son necesarios para el grounding. Una implementación exitosa requiere definir claramente los Topics, Actions e Instructions del agente.

question:
Universal Containers wants to reduce overall agent handling time by minimizing the time spent typing routine answers for common questions in-chat, and reducing the post-chat analysis by suggesting values for case fields.
Which combination of Einstein for Service features enables this effort?
options: Einstein Service Replies and Work Summaries
Einstein Reply Recommendations and Case Summaries
Einstein Reply Recommendations and Case Classification
explanation: Para reducir el tiempo de manejo de agentes minimizando la escritura, Einstein Service Replies genera respuestas sugeridas que los agentes pueden revisar y enviar con un clic. Esto reduce significativamente el tiempo dedicado a redactar respuestas individuales manteniendo la calidad y consistencia del servicio.

question: Where should the AI Specialist go to add/update actions assigned to a Agentforce or copilot ?
options: Agentforce or copilot  Actions page, the record page for the Agentforce or copilot  action, or the Agentforce or copilot  Action Library tab
Agentforce or copilot  Actions page or Global Actions
Agentforce or copilot  Detail page, Global Actions, or the record page for the Agentforce or copilot  action
explanation: Para agregar o actualizar acciones asignadas a un Agentforce Agent, el AI Specialist debe ir a la página de detalles de Agent Actions en el Setup de Agentforce. Desde ahí se pueden asignar las acciones a los Topics correspondientes del agente de forma centralizada.

question:
Universal Containers implemented Einstein Agentforce or copilot  for its users. One user complains that Einstein Agentforce or copilot  is not deleting activities from the past 7 days.
What is the reason for this issue?
options: Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Delete Record Action permission is not associated to the user.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  does not have the permission to delete the user's records.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  does not support the Delete Record action.
explanation: Si un usuario se queja de que el agente no responde correctamente a sus solicitudes, el AI Specialist debe revisar las Action Instructions y Topic Instructions del agente para asegurar que estén correctamente definidas y sin ambigüedades. Las instrucciones definen cómo el LLM interpreta y enruta las solicitudes.

question:
A support team handles a high volume of chat interactions and needs a solution to provide quick, relevant responses to customer inquiries. Responses must be grounded in the organization's knowledge base to maintain consistency and accuracy.
Which feature in Einstein for Service should the support team use?
options: Einstein Service Replies
Einstein Reply Recommendations
Einstein Knowledge Recommendations
explanation: Para un equipo de soporte con alto volumen de chats que necesita respuestas rápidas basadas en la base de conocimiento, Einstein Service Replies es la solución correcta. Esta función genera respuestas sugeridas en tiempo real durante el chat, fundamentadas en los artículos de Knowledge de la organización.

question:
An AI Specialist has created a Agentforce or copilot  custom action using flow as the reference action type. However, it is not delivering the expected results to the conversation preview, and therefore needs troubleshooting.
What should the AI Specialist do to identify the root cause of the problem?
options: In Agentforce or copilot  Builder within the Dynamic Panel, turn on dynamic debugging to show the inputs and outputs.
In Agentforce or copilot  Builder within the Dynamic Panel, confirm selected action and observe the values in Input and Output sections.
In Agentforce or copilot  Builder, verify the utterance entered by the user and review session event logs for debug information.
explanation: Al crear una acción personalizada usando un Flow como acción de referencia, el AI Specialist debe asegurarse de que el Flow sea de tipo Screen Flow o Auto-launched Flow compatible con Agentforce. El Flow debe tener los inputs y outputs correctamente definidos para que el agente pueda invocarlos y procesar los resultados.

question:
A service agent is looking at a custom object that stores travel information. They recently received a weather alert and now need to cancel flights for the customers that are related with this itinerary. The service agent needs to review the Knowledge articles about canceling and rebooking the customer flights.
Which Einstein Agentforce or copilot  capability helps the agent accomplish this?
options: Execute tasks based on available actions, answering questions using information from accessible Knowledge articles.
Invoke a flow which makes a call to external data to create a Knowledge article.
Generate a Knowledge article based off the prompts that the agent enters to create steps to cancel flights.
explanation: Agentforce puede ejecutar tareas basadas en las acciones disponibles y responder preguntas usando artículos de Knowledge accesibles, permitiendo al agente de servicio gestionar cancelaciones de vuelos y consultar guías de rebooking simultáneamente. Las otras opciones describen capacidades más limitadas o incorrectas del agente.

question: What is the role of the large language model (LLM) in executing an Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Action?
options: Find similar requests and provide actions that need to be executed
Identify the best matching actions and correct order of execution
Determine a user's access and sort actions by priority to be executed
explanation: El LLM en Agentforce identifica las acciones más relevantes y el orden óptimo de ejecución para satisfacer la solicitud del usuario. No busca solicitudes similares ni determina permisos de acceso; su rol es la planificación inteligente y selección de acciones basada en el contexto de la conversación.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales team to get insights into product and competitor names mentioned during calls. 
How should UC meet this requirement?
options: Enable Einstein Conversation Insights, assign permission sets, define recording managers, and customize insights with up to 50 competitor names.
Enable Einstein Conversation Insights, connect a recording provider, assign permission sets, and customize insights with up to 25 products.
Enable Einstein Conversation Insights, enable sales recording, assign permission sets, and customize insights with up to 50 products.
explanation: Para habilitar insights de Einstein Conversation Insights sobre productos y competidores mencionados en llamadas, se debe conectar un proveedor de grabación, asignar permission sets y personalizar los insights. El límite estándar es 25 productos; las otras opciones tienen números incorrectos o pasos incorrectos de configuración.

question: How does the Einstein Trust Layer ensure that sensitive data is protected while generating useful and meaningful responses?
options: Masked data will be de-masked during response journey.
Masked data will be de-masked during request journey.
Responses that do not meet the relevance threshold will be automatically rejected.
explanation: El Einstein Trust Layer enmascara datos sensibles durante el viaje de request (antes de enviar al LLM) y los desenmascara durante el viaje de response al devolver la respuesta al usuario. Este mecanismo protege la privacidad de los datos sin perder la utilidad de las respuestas generadas por la IA.

question:
Universal Containers wants to utilize Einstein for Sales to help sales reps reach their sales quotas by providing Al-generated plans containing guidance and steps for closing deals. 
Which feature should the AI Specialist recommend to the sales team?
options: Find Similar Deals
Create Account Plan
Create Close Plan
explanation: Create Close Plan es la función de Einstein for Sales que genera planes con orientación y pasos específicos para ayudar a los reps a cerrar oportunidades y alcanzar sus cuotas. Find Similar Deals busca oportunidades parecidas y Create Account Plan es para estrategias de cuenta, no para planes de cierre específicos.

question:
A Salesforce Administrator is exploring the capabilities of Einstein Agentforce or copilot  to enhance user interaction within their organization. They are particularly interested in how Einstein Agentforce or copilot  processes user requests and the mechanism it employs to deliver responses. The administrator is evaluating whether Einstein Agentforce or copilot  directly interfaces with a large language model (LLM) to fetch and display responses to user inquiries, facilitating a broad range of requests from users. 
How does Einstein Agentforce or copilot  handle user requests In Salesforce?
options: Einstein Agentforce or copilot  will trigger a flow that utilizes a prompt template to generate the message.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  will perform an HTTP callout to an LLM provider.
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  analyzes the user's request and LLM technology is used to generate and display the appropriate response.
explanation: Agentforce analiza la solicitud del usuario y usa tecnología LLM para generar y mostrar la respuesta apropiada, actuando como una capa inteligente integrada en la plataforma Salesforce. No hace HTTP callouts directos al LLM ni simplemente dispara flows; orquesta el procesamiento de forma integrada con el CRM.

question:
An administrator is responsible for ensuring the security and reliability of Universal Containers' (UC) CRM data. UC needs enhanced data protection and up-to-date AI capabilities. UC also needs to include relevant information from a Salesforce record to be merged with the prompt. 
Which feature in the Einstein Trust Layer best supports UC's need?
options: Data masking
Dynamic grounding with secure data retrieval
Zero-data retention policy
explanation: Dynamic grounding with secure data retrieval en el Einstein Trust Layer permite incluir información de registros de Salesforce en el prompt de forma segura, combinando protección de datos con relevancia contextual. Data masking solo oculta datos y zero-data retention solo controla la retención, sin habilitar grounding dinámico.

question:
An AI Specialist built a Field Generation prompt template that worked for many records, but users are reporting random failures with token limit errors. 
What is the cause of the random nature of this error?
options: The number of tokens generated by the dynamic nature of the prompt template will vary by record.
The template type needs to be switched to Flex to accommodate the variable amount of tokens generated by the prompt grounding.
The number of tokens that can be processed by the LLM varies with total user demand.
explanation: Los errores de token limit son aleatorios porque el número de tokens varía según el contenido dinámico de cada registro; algunos tienen más datos que otros. No es un problema del tipo de template ni de la demanda total del LLM; es la variabilidad inherente de los datos en cada registro procesado.

question:
Universal Containers’ data science team is hosting a generative large language model (LLM) on Amazon Web Services (AWS). 
What should the team use to access externally-hosted models in the Salesforce Platform?
options: Model Builder
App Builder
Agentforce or copilot  Builder
explanation: Model Builder es la herramienta de Salesforce para conectar y gestionar modelos LLM externos alojados en plataformas como AWS. App Builder es para interfaces de usuario y Agentforce Builder es para configurar agentes, no para registrar o gestionar modelos de IA externos en la plataforma.

question:
An administrator wants to check the response of the Flex prompt template they've built, but the preview button is greyed out.
What is the reason for this?
options: The records related to the prompt have not been selected.
The prompt has not been saved and activated,
A merge field has not been inserted in the prompt.
explanation: Para revisar la respuesta de un Flex prompt template previamente construido, el AI Specialist debe ir al Prompt Builder y usar la función de preview/test del template con un registro de muestra. Si el template no tiene registros de prueba configurados, primero debe seleccionar un registro válido para la validación.

question:
Universal Containers’ current AI data masking rules do not align with organizational privacy and security policies and requirements. 
What should an AI Specialist recommend to resolve the issue?
options: Enable data masking for sandbox refreshes.
Configure data masking in the Einstein Trust Layer setup.
Add new data masking rules in LLM setup.
explanation: Para actualizar las reglas de enmascaramiento de datos de IA que no cumplen con las políticas de privacidad, se debe ir al setup del Einstein Trust Layer y reconfigurar las reglas de data masking. Las otras opciones (sandbox refresh o LLM setup) no son los puntos correctos para gestionar el data masking de IA.

question: What is an AI Specialist able to do when the “Enrich event logs with conversation data" setting in Einstein Agentforce or copilot  is enabled?
options: View the user click path that led to each Agentforce or copilot  action.
View session data including user Input and Agentforce or copilot  responses for sessions over the past 7 days.
Generate details reports on all Agentforce or copilot  conversations over any time period.
explanation: Al habilitar 'Enrich event logs with conversation data', el AI Specialist puede ver datos de sesión incluyendo inputs del usuario y respuestas del agente de los últimos 7 días. Esta configuración tiene un límite temporal de 7 días y no permite ver el click path completo ni generar reportes históricos sin límite.

question:
Universal Containers wants to make a sales proposal and directly use data from multiple unrelated objects (standard and custom) in a prompt template. 
What should the AI Specialist recommend?
options: Create a Flex template to add resources with standard and custom objects as inputs.
Create a prompt template passing in a special custom object that connects the records temporarily,
Create a prompt template-triggered flow to access the data from standard and custom objects.
explanation: Un Flex Template es la solución correcta para usar datos de múltiples objetos estándar y personalizados no relacionados en una propuesta de ventas. Las plantillas estándar están limitadas a un objeto base y no admiten múltiples fuentes de datos independientes como inputs del template.

question:
Universal Containers is considering leveraging the Einstein Trust Layer in conjunction with Einstein Generative AI Audit Data. 
Which audit data is available using the Einstein Trust Layer?
options: Response accuracy and offensiveness score
Hallucination score and bias score
Masked data and toxicity score
explanation: El Einstein Trust Layer proporciona datos de auditoría que incluyen datos enmascarados y puntuación de toxicidad, permitiendo revisar el procesamiento de IA. No proporciona métricas de precisión de respuesta, puntuaciones de alucinación ni puntuaciones de sesgo, que requieren sistemas de evaluación separados.

question:
Leadership needs to populate a dynamic form field with a summary or description created by a large language model (LLM) to facilitate more productive conversations with customers. Leadership also wants to keep a human in the loop to be considered in their AI strategy. 
Which prompt template type should the AI Specialist recommend?
options: Sales Email
Field Generation
Record Summary
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo de prompt template correcto para poblar campos de formularios dinámicos con contenido generado por LLM, con revisión humana antes de guardar. Sales Email es para correos electrónicos de ventas y Record Summary es para resúmenes generales de registros, no para campos específicos en formularios.

question:
Universal Containers recently launched a pilot program to integrate conversational AI into its CRM business operations with Einstein Agentforce or copilot .
How should the AI Specialist monitor Agentforce or copilot 's usability and the assignment of actions?
options: Run a report on the Platform Debug Logs.
Query the Agentforce or copilot  log data using the metadata API.
Run Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Analytics.
explanation: Einstein Agentforce Analytics es la herramienta correcta para monitorear la usabilidad del agente y la asignación de acciones, proporcionando métricas y reportes de uso conversacional. Platform Debug Logs son para errores técnicos y la Metadata API no está diseñada para el análisis de conversaciones del agente.
